name: Lauma
title: "Evermoon's Sacrament Song" Lauma
desc: The mirrored moon fractures in the water.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Lauma to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with her

skills.name: Runo: Dawnless Rest of Karsikko
skills.desc: Deal ? ?, as well as generate Frostgrove Sanctuary. If you have a card in your Hand with Cost Reduction, remove Cost Reduction from a random card and instead generate a Frostgrove Sanctuary that deals 2 DMG.

skills.name: Runo: All Hearts Become the Beating Moon
skills.desc: Apply Cost Reduction to 3 random cards with Current Elemental Dice Cost greater than 0 in your Hand. Generate 3 stacks of Pale Hymn.

skills.name: Moonsign Benediction: Nature's Chorus
skills.desc:
(Passive) During this game, when your opponent is affected by Bloom reaction(s), the reaction will be converted to the Lunar-Bloom reaction.
When the opponent is affected by Lunar-Bloom reaction: Apply Cost Reduction to 1 random card in your Deck.
